order: SHARED.md sec 7 -- contract parses 32-byte big-endian Fr in this exact order

public_inputs.name: merkle_root
public_inputs.description: Merkle root the spent note belongs to; contract checks it is in the root-history ring buffer.

public_inputs.name: nullifier
public_inputs.description: hash2(commitment, spending_key); contract marks it spent to prevent double-spend.

public_inputs.name: recipient_hash
public_inputs.description: hash2(recipient_address_as_field, 0); binds the proof to the payout recipient.

public_inputs.name: amount
public_inputs.description: Withdrawal amount (public; drives the SAC transfer). Equals the note amount.

public_inputs.name: asset_id
public_inputs.description: Asset id (public; 0 = native XLM). Equals the note asset.
